product_name: Beaute Melasma-X Glutathione Brightening Tone Up Cream 45 ml
product_description: TheBeaute Melasma-X Glutathione Brightening Tone Up Cream(45 ml) isa Korean skincare product designed to provide an instant brightening effect while addressing melasma, hyperpigmentation, and wrinkles with ingredients likeglutathioneandniacinamide.Key Benefits & FeaturesInstant Brightening & Tone-Up Effect: The cream provides an immediate radiant and even appearance to the skin upon application, functioning well as a day cream or makeup primer.Melasma & Dark Spot Care: Key ingredients such as glutathione (1000 ppm), niacinamide, and arbutin work to reduce melanin production, fade existing dark spots, freckles, and melasma, and prevent new discoloration.Hydration & Anti-Aging: Formulated with sodium hyaluronate, ceramides, and hydrolyzed collagen, it offers deep hydration, improves skin elasticity, and helps reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles.Soothing & Protective Ingredients: Extracts like Centella Asiatica (Cica) and Green Tea help to calm sensitive skin and protect against environmental stressors, making it suitable for all skin types.Lightweight Formula: Reviewers note its non-greasy texture that absorbs quickly, which is ideal for daily use in various climates.
